Ray Tracing: Disabled (This is ON by default and will tank your performance)
Upscaling: AMD FidelityFX 3
FSR Quality: Balanced or Performance
FSR Sharpness: This is personal preference, but I’d start at 35% and increase it from there.
The Advanced Settings that are below “Graphics Quality” should all remain at Low, but you can experiment with changing Texture Quality and Post Processing Quality to improve the appearance of textures, at a very slight hit to frame rate.
In the “UI” tab, set text size to Largest
Additionally, it may be helpful to go into the game’s Properties before you launch it, and ensure the “Compatibility” setting is checked and “Proton Hotfix” is selected. This will just ensure that if Valve makes any improvements that will benefit Steam Deck players (as it frequently does, most famously with Elden Ring), you’ll be first in line to get them.

Comedy Writing Class 25 Jokes
#ComedyWriting
1. Family sues Delta after drunken passenger allegedly groped mom and her teen daughter on flight: 
The passenger was arrested and charged with disorderly conduct and incest, for groping his mom and teen sister.

2. Tennessee has placed a 6% tax on cannabis derived THC products, a controversial decision considering Marijuana is not legal in the state: 
For those who don't know, THC is an acronym which means "Tennessee Hates Cannabis"

*3. U.S. ban on popular lightbulb goes into effect Aug. 1: 
U.S. residents will no longer be able to buy blacklights without a medical marijuana card.

*4. 1st US nuclear reactor built from scratch in decades enters commercial operation in Georgia: 
I'm sorry, that's a typo... 1st US new color tractor built from scratch in decades enters commercial operation in Georgia. They're pink.

5. Chinese zoo denies its sun bears are humans dressed in costumes: They issued a statement, saying, "That was just zhou (Joe) He was weird. 
He's in prison now. Please come back." Roughly translated.

6. S.C. judge orders Woman accused of killing bride in DUI golf cart crash must remain in custody: 
The real crime, though, is having your wedding on a golf course.

• 7. Vegan influencer Zhanna Samsonova 'dies from starvation and exhaustion' after switching to diet of tropical fruit:
But you know what she didn't die of? Scurvy. Tropical Fruits up One. 

8. Fatal stabbing of NYC gay man is being investigated as a possible hate crime:
The accused claims they did not know the victim was gay, stating, "There is no hate in my heart. I just be stabbin' people sometimes. "

*9. NASA hears signal from Voyager 2 spacecraft after mistakenly cutting contact:
The message, according to scientists, was, "Sorry I lost you, I was going through a tunnel."

10.Former Lizzo dancers were weight-shamed and pressured while at strip club, lawsuit says:
The former dancers have been identified as Lizzo's Ankles.

11.Arkansas deputy shoots at Pomeranian but hits woman standing on porch instead:
Thank God! For a second I thought this was gonna be one of those sad "Cop shoots Dog" stories.

12.Appeals court throws out conviction after judge says Black man 'looks like a criminal to me':
The judge elaborated on his statement saying, "He was wearing an orange prison jumpsuit, had an inmate number sewn on his chest, and was black." Dress for the job you want, not the one you have, right?

13. 7-Eleven workers beat would-be robber with stick until suspect starts crying:
The suspect was not stealing anything, but it was Arkansas, and he was black.

14. Tickets for feeding Houston's homeless thrown out after police no-shows:
In other news, Authorities are investigating homicide involving a police officer who was fed to the homeless. 

15. Two people caught swine flu after visiting pig exhibits at agricultural fairs:
Fair Organizers have placed new regulations on exhibits, now requiring all pigs get vaccinated and wear a masks. Some Pigs claimed this violated their civil liberties and stormed the Funnel Cake Truck. One Pig died on the scene and two are in critical condition. No funnel cakes were injured. 

16. Mark Margolis, actor known for roles in 'Breaking Bad' and 'Scarface,' dies at 83: 
Was she the one that played Walter's wife? No? Dang! I was hoping it was her.

17: Montana otter attack leaves 3 women hurt one sent hospital:
Montana Wildlife Control are still searching for the adorable attackers. 

18: Florida effectively bans AP Psychology course over LGBTQ content, College Board says: 
The Board's main concern was that since there is already an L a G and a B Why do they need the Q? On the bright side, the board DID use the course's preferred pronouns.

19: Suspect arrested after human remains found in 3 suitcases in Florida:
Police found the suspect on the set of the popular TV show Shark Tank pitching his new product - A suitcase that can hold as many human remains as three of the leading brand!

20. Russian ship hit in Novorossiysk, Black Sea drone attack, Ukraine sources say:
Could have just said the Black Sea. Novorossiysk is implied. 

21. Air Force pulls off first AI flight in pilotless plane:
This new technology is expected to drastically cut down the guilt drone pilots experience when BOMBING WEDDING PARTIES IN YEMEN.

22. Nigeria Senate cautions against Niger military intervention:
Am I allowed to say that?

23. Phony bank accounts resurface at Wells Fargo, with a twist: These bank accounts can DANCE! Catch Dancing with the Phony Bank Accounts! Series Premiere tonight on ABC.

7 years ago my dog died, my wife left me, and the house I grew up in burned down with my father inside. 
The preds nearly won the stanley cup that year, so highs and lows, ya know?
Some of my clothes survived but the scent of house fire never goes away. When I moved into my new apartment my roommate said, "Dang, dude, your clothes smell like cigarettes." and I said, "Nahhh.... Just... one cigarette." 

Please laugh. lol

He was 76 when he died. He smoked and drank since he was 13, fought in Vietnam, 3 quadruple bypass surgeries, Pancreatitis, and addicted to painkillers... he was taking morphine to sleep and never even had a song crack the billboard hot 100. No Grammy's. Not even an MTV music award.

One 4th of July we threw a party with some fireworks my cousin got from Guatemala. Louder than snoop dogg at 4:21. Shook the ground, set off car alarms, until our shell-shocked neighbor got Vietnam flashbacks and pointed a loaded gun at my Dad's chest. You know what Dad said?
"Shoot me, Mother Fucker! I'm Bullet Proof!!!"
 He was drunker than a yodeler at ocktoberfest, but that was awesome! 
My mom absoultely hated it!

For 10 years I watched his health slowly decline. I drove him all his appointments. One day he saw a woman with short legs walking into the hospital and asked me, "Do you think she's got a case against the city?" 
I said, "For what?"
"...For building the sidewalk too close to her ass."
I know!!? I laughed so hard I cried.

One time I asked Dad if he wanted to be put in hospice or an assisted living home if he got too sick. He said "No... I'm gonna die in this house." Which was sad... because I was hoping he would move to the villages in Florida. Sure, They have the highest rate of Chlamydia in the country from all the senior citizen swingers parties, but they have like 30 pickle ball courts. Have you played pickleball? It's gonna be an Olympic sport.

When Dad realized the house was on fire he got my Mom and the animals out of the house. He didnt make it out. He died in that house. 

The house was built in the 1950s and was falling apart inside and out. The insurance settlement gave mom a brand new house and and half a milion dollars for personal property. Can you believe my parents owned 23 brand new 75 inch 8K TV's? Farm Beaureau Insurance believed it so lets not drop it.

I'm not sad about losing my Dad. Death is a part of life, and it's not even the worst part! The worst part is Middle School... obviously.

That year I started doing standup as a creative outlet to cope. So if you liked my set you can thank... FIRE!

This TERRIBLE joke isn't meant to disrespect my dad or make light of a tragedy. He literally gave everything he had for us. It is meant to honor him, I know he would be laughing if he were here.

But My mom fucken HATES it. 

Thank I love y'all

best_version:
High Concept Premises
#premise

Critical Factor Bypass:
Bypassing the critical factor means moving a subject from their conscious mind into their unconscious mind. The critical factor is an internal filter that checks what is allowed in and what is not. It acts as a filter between the logical part of the brain, the conscious mind, and the emotional part, the subconscious.
Hypnosis is a way to bypass the critical factor. Under hypnosis, the critical filter goes to sleep for a while. The conscious mind stays awake and can still make decisions. The subconscious is receptive to any suggestion that the conscious mind wants to let in.
One way to bypass the critical factor is with a shock. To do this, deliver the shock and immediately follow up with a command to go into hypnosis.

Neurolinguistic Programming:
Neuro-linguistic programming (NLP) is a psychological approach that uses techniques to improve communication, relationships, and personal development. NLP is based on the idea that thoughts, language, and behaviors are connected. By changing one of these elements, you can change the others.
NLP involves analyzing strategies used by successful people and applying them to reach a personal goal. It may reduce anxiety and improve overall well-being.
NLP has become widespread since it started in the 1970s. However, there is no scientific evidence supporting the claims made by NLP advocates, and it has been called a pseudoscience. Scientific reviews have shown that NLP is based on outdated metaphors of the brain's inner workings that are inconsistent with current neurological theory.
